call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car. 
Agent: Excellent! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Yeah, that's… that's pretty good. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed, right? 
Agent: Absolutely. 8.99% for the life of the loan. 
Eleanor: Alright. Sounds good. Let's do it. 
Agent: Fantastic! I just need to verify a few details…

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller, this is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card…
Robert: (Interrupting) Where did you get my number? I told you people yesterday I'm not interested! 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We just wanted to inform you about…
Robert: Inconvenience? You're harassing me! I'm on the Do Not Call list, I think! This is ridiculous. I don't need a Signature Credit Card, especially at 19.99% – you think I'm stupid? 
Agent: Sir, I assure you…
Robert: No, you assure me nothing! Take my number off your list! (hangs up)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. Your friend, Michael, referred you for a Personal Loan. How are you today? 
Jessica: Hey, yeah, Michael mentioned you guys. I'm good. 
Agent: Wonderful! So, we can offer you a $15,000 Personal Loan at 7.49%. What are you planning to use the funds for? 
Jessica: I'm thinking of renovating my kitchen. 
Agent: That's a great investment! Now, have you looked at any other loan options? 
Jessica: I checked with my bank, but their rate was higher, like 8.5%. 
Agent: Exactly! We consistently offer more competitive rates. Our Personal Loan also has flexible repayment terms. We can tailor it to your budget. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay. What's the catch? 
Agent: No catch! Just a simple application process and a quick approval. We believe in making things easy for our customers. 
Jessica: Alright, I'm interested in learning more. Can you send me some information via email?

Agent: Hello David, this is Lisa calling from Finance Solutions. I see you applied for our Signature Credit Card online. How are you doing today? 
David: Uh, yeah, hi. I'm alright. 
Agent: Great! We're pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card with a 14.99% interest rate. This card offers excellent rewards and benefits. 
David: 14.99%? That seems a little high. 
Agent: It's competitive for someone with your credit profile, David. However, the rewards program – 2% cash back on all purchases – can offset the interest. 
David: I don't know… I'm trying to build my credit. 
Agent: This card is actually a great way to do that! Responsible use and timely payments will significantly improve your score. We report to all three major credit bureaus. 
David: Hmm… okay. What about annual fees? 
Agent: There's a $99 annual fee, but it's waived for the first year. 
David: Okay, that's… something to think about.

Agent: Hello Maria, this is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. We have a special offer on a Personal Loan…
Maria: (Interrupting) Look, I don't know who you are or where you got my number, but I'm not interested in any loans. I'm unemployed, okay? I can't afford anything. 
Agent: Ma'am, we understand your situation. We are pre-approving you for a $3,000 Personal Loan at 24.99%…
Maria: 24.99?! Are you kidding me? That's highway robbery! I'm hanging up now. (hangs up)
